tagline: June 2, 2026 Lakeflow Connect now supports a managed connector for ingestion from Pendo.
what_it_does: June 2, 2026 Lakeflow Connect now supports a managed connector for ingestion from Pendo. See [Pendo connector](/aws/en/ingestion/lakeflow connect/pendo overview).
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.

capabilities.title: June 2, 2026 Lakeflow
capabilities.desc: June 2, 2026 Lakeflow Connect now supports a managed connector for ingestion from Pendo.

key_takeaway: June 2, 2026 Lakeflow Connect now supports a managed connector for ingestion from Pendo.
